## Small advisory firm opens sub-$250K position in Intel

Position size and context make this a non-event for Intel thesis monitoring. Not actionable.

- Blodgett Wealth Advisors initiated a $232,000 position in INTC.
- Position size is sub-institutional; no investment rationale disclosed.
